name: Triller Group Inc.
business: Triller Group Inc. operates a global, artificial intelligence (AI) powered technology platform serving Creators and Brands, and through Hong Kong subsidiaries, a leading wealth management and healthcare institution servicing over 400,000 individual and corporate customers.

exposures.sentence: We are a global, artificial intelligence ( AI ) powered technology platform ( Technology Platform ) that serves a broad constituency of Creators and Brands around the world.
We currently operate in four market-leading businesses: our Platform Business, Distribution Business, Healthcare Business, and Fintech Business (collectively as Financial Services Business).

Our largest distribution channel is the FA Business, operating under the brand name Focus. With its large salesforce of financial advisors, Focus provides a wide range of financial products and independent advisory services to individual and corporate customers, primarily in connection with life insurance products.
We also have a market leadership in our healthcare business through our 4% stake in and a strategic partnership with HCMPS. It is one of the most reputed healthcare brands in Hong Kong.

Our Triller app is a short-form video app similar to TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube shorts and other video apps that allow users to access both user generated and professionally generated content from Creators around the world.

catalysts.sentence: PIPE / rights issue April June 2026 $40 million $50 million

tamClaims.claim: Global digital content marketplace estimated to reach $577.4 billion in 2023
tamClaims.sentence: We operate within the global digital content marketplace, which is estimated to reach $577.4 billion in 2023 according to Statistica's August 2023 report on worldwide digital media.

tamClaims.claim: Creator economy forecasted at $250 billion and could reach $480 billion by 2027
tamClaims.sentence: Goldman Sachs Research estimated the creator economy could reach $480 billion by 2027 in its April 2023 report titled The creator economy could approach half-a-trillion dollars by 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Focus on the $250 billion creator economy
tamClaims.sentence: We focus our efforts on the $250 billion creator economy, as forecasted in a recent Goldman Sachs report on the creator economy.
